full_text:
Zhang Chuan 張泉
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Chuan (張泉)was born in Wuwei. Took part in Wei Feng’s conspiracy and executed when it failed. Zhang Chuan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Zhang Chuan lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
